g.text: A. BEST CASE (cherry-picked to FAVOR a carrier): the DENSEST 1 s in the whole session (t≈8212s, 50 edges vs ~78 for a real 26 Hz trial). Even here: irregular, no fixed period.

g.text: C. ALL intervals, whole session (NOT cherry-picked): typical gap is 231 ms — 6× slower than the tactor. Only 2.4% land near 38.5 ms, never in a sustained run.

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Dec 3 TTL cannot recover tactor phase. Panel A is the BEST/densest window (cherry-picked to favor a carrier); Panel C is ALL data (typical). ch7 toggles ~4×/s; a 26 Hz tactor toggles 26×/s → tactor does ~6 full up/down cycles between ch7 edges.
